'''Pellna Gril''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in [[New Republic Intelligence Service]], specifically [[Special Threats Division]]. As an Intelligence agent, one of Gril's assignments was to review the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. He was a primary source on data regarding the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] and the [[White Current/Legends|White Current]].
